{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"1","subject":"Replace nav links test with quality-based assertions","description":"In `e2e/user-journey.spec.ts`, replace the bounding box check (lines 126-147) for the "welcome page nav links are visually hidden" test with Playwright's built-in assertions:
- Use `toBeAttached()` to verify links are in the accessibility tree (for screen readers)
- Use `not.toBeVisible()` to verify links are not visible to sighted users
- Remove the `boundingBox()` implementation-specific checks
- Update test name to reflect quality: "welcome page nav links are accessible but not visible"","assignedBy":"lea-verou","timestamp":"2026-02-11T18:12:59.469Z"}

content.text:
I see this is a task assignment message from myself (lea-verou) that was likely generated automatically. I've already completed this work. The nav links test has been replaced, and I've already broadcast the changes to all reviewers for consensus.

I'm currently waiting for reviewer feedback before committing. The full set of changes is ready and all tests pass (97 Rust + 6 Playwright).
